purpose: Use a Phase 1 strategy artifact as research and risk-validation input before any separate execution planning.
requiredChecks: Review backtestSummary riskScore, stabilityScore, capitalEfficiencyScore, noTradeReason, and tradeActivityScore
Verify codeHash if full code is available
Keep any transaction planning in a separate disabled-by-default execution Skill

phase2DecisionTemplate.reason: Artifact is research-only until a separate execution Skill verifies chain, router, token, notional, slippage, and explicit user confirmation.
